title: China's Xi Jinping skips BRICS Summit for first time; Vladimir Putin attends online — Here's why
description: Xi Jinping and Vladimir Putin missed the 17th BRICS Summit in Brazil. Xi sent PM Li Qiang to attend the talks in Rio de Janeiro
keywords: why Xi jinping  not in BRICS, why china missed BRICS, putin misses BRICS, BRICS, Brazil, russia, china
snippet:
China president Xi Jinping and his Russian counterpart Vladimir Putin skipped the 17th BRICS Summit in Brazil's Rio De Janeiro on Sunday, July 6.
